meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Blue Team Village - JunWei Song & KunYu Chen -  QuarkEngine
meta.description: Android malware analysis engine is not a new story. Every antivirus company has their own secrets to build it. With python and curiosity, we develop a malware scoring system from the perspective of Taiwan Criminal Law in an easy but solid way.
